fullArticle:
Can the US Supreme Court stay independent?

Constitutional law professor and former assistant US attorney Kim Wehle says rising threats against judges are eroding the rule of law. She warns that when justice is based on loyalty to individuals or ideology rather than the law, democracy is at risk....
